mapper.select: SELECT artist_id, artist_name, artist_image_url, created_at FROM artists ORDER BY artist_name
SELECT artist_id, artist_name, artist_image_url, created_at FROM artists WHERE artist_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY artist_name
SELECT artist_id, artist_name, artist_image_url, created_at FROM artists WHERE artist_id=#{artistId}
SELECT song_id, artist_id, theme_id, song_title, album_image_url, release_date FROM songs ORDER BY release_date DESC
SELECT song_id, song_title, artist_id, theme_id, album_image_url, release_date FROM songs WHERE song_title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') ORDER BY release_date
SELECT song_id, song_title, artist_id, theme_id, album_image_url, release_date FROM songs WHERE song_id=#{songId}
SELECT song_id, song_title, artist_id, theme_id, album_image_url, release_date FROM songs WHERE theme_id=#{themeId}
SELECT theme_id, theme_name, created_at FROM themes ORDER BY theme_name
SELECT theme_id, theme_name, created_at FROM themes WHERE theme_id=#{themeId}
SELECT room_id, room_name, target_id, theme_id, created_at FROM chat_rooms ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT room_id, room_name, target_id, theme_id, created_at FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id=#{roomId}
SELECT message_id, room_id, member_id, message, sent_at FROM chat_messages WHERE room_id=#{roomId} ORDER BY message_id
SELECT message_id, room_id, member_id, message, sent_at FROM chat_messages WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND message_id > #{lastMessageId} ORDER BY message_id
SELECT room_id, member_id FROM chat_room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( room_name, target_id, theme_id ) VALUES ( #{roomName}, #{targetId}, #{themeId} )
INSERT INTO chat_messages ( room_id, member_id, message ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{memberId}, #{message} )
